_comment: Manually verified regular (non-sale) shelf prices at major Ontario chains. Update monthly. Prices in $/kg unless noted. Median used for comparisons.

chicken_wings.name: Chicken wings (fresh)
chicken_wings.notes: Fresh whole wings only. Excludes frozen bags and pre-marinated/breaded products.

beef_brisket.name: Beef brisket
beef_brisket.notes: Fresh flat/whole brisket. Metro vac-pack ($17.61/kg) excluded — regular fresh-case price used. Flipp historical avg ($35.81) was unreliable (4 obs, wide range).

lamb_leg.name: Leg of lamb (bone-in)
lamb_leg.notes: Bone-in leg only. Excludes boneless rolled roasts. Walmart removed — product delisted/OOS.

pork_back_ribs.name: Pork back ribs
pork_back_ribs.notes: Fresh raw back ribs only. Excludes pre-cooked/frozen branded products.
